'''''Bounty Hunters''''' is the sixth expansion as well as the second huge expansion to [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s [[Star Wars Miniatures]] game. It was released on September 23, 2006, following the [[Champions of the Force (Star Wars Miniatures)|''Champions of the Force'']] expansion. As the name implies, it comprises mainly figures of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]]. This expansion set also introduced [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] as a playable faction. The box artwork is by [[Chris Trevas]].

==Contents==
{{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Bounty Hunters (Star Wars Miniatures)}}
